rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to navigate from the homepage using a navigation bar.
The system shall display information about projects when selected by the user.
The system shall allow users to choose between viewing photos or watching videos when viewing projects.
The system shall display information about career opportunities when selected by the user.
The system shall allow users to choose between viewing updates or opening an application form for employment or internship when viewing career opportunities.
The system shall check submitted job applications after they are submitted.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should allow users to navigate from the homepage using a navigation bar.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A person begins at the homepage and uses the navigation bar to choose what they want to see.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should display information about projects when selected by the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They may look at projects, available departments, the history of the firm, news and blogs, or career opportunities.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When viewing projects, users can choose to view photos or watch videos.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose to look at projects, they can either view photos or watch videos.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system should display information about career opportunities when selected by the user.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: They may look at projects, available departments, the history of the firm, news and blogs, or career opportunities.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When viewing career opportunities, users can choose to view updates or open an application form for employment or internship.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they choose career opportunities, they may either view updates or open the application form for employment or internship.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After submitting a job application through the system, it should be checked by the system.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After filling in the form, the application is checked.
